selected.reason: Introduces the first major section '一、安装' with clear text and context for the video's beginning, serving as a practical anchor for course structure.
Displays a clear UI screenshot from Xcode with labeled settings switches, providing concrete visual evidence for '基础设置' section content that is material and teachable.
Shows a detailed step in '实例开发' with a highlighted alert dialog and instruction, valuable for demonstrating workflow and avoiding common errors.
Contains a comprehensive numbered list of setup steps for Xcode and iPhone pairing, ideal for verification and source-backed review of technical procedures.

dropped_summary: Frames 0002 (animated scene), 0005 (lecturer-only with no visual content), and 0007 (lecturer-only with overlapping speech) were dropped due to lack of visual teaching artifacts. Other frames lacked unique or complete visual information compared to selected ones.
